headline: Behr Paint Company Sponsors Jill of All Trades to Support the Next Generation of Women in Skilled Trades
summary: Introducing young women to career opportunities in the painting trades through experiential learning eventsTORONTO, July 14, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Behr Paint Company is returning as a sponsor of Jill of All Trades (JOAT) at select colleges across Ontario, reinforcing its commitment to supporting women in the skilled trades. Through the partnership, Behr helps introduce young women to career opportunities in the painting trades while promoting greater diversity and representation across the in

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Masco, Raises Price Target to $87
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Sam Reid   maintains Masco (NYSE:MAS) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $85 to $87.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Masco, Raises Price Target to $82
summary: Barclays  analyst Matthew Bouley   maintains Masco (NYSE:MAS) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $78 to $82.
